name: server-messages
description: Broadcasts scheduled server announcements using sequential or weighted shuffle-bag rotation.

messages.description: Messages to broadcast. Supports {playerCount} and {serverName} placeholders. Weight only affects random order.

text.description: The message text to broadcast. Supports {playerCount} and {serverName}; unknown placeholders are left unchanged. Whitespace-only messages are ignored.

weight.description: Relative frequency in random weighted shuffle-bag mode. Capped at 100 to keep shuffle bags bounded.

order.description: Broadcast order. Random uses a weighted shuffle bag.

broadcast.description: Broadcast the next configured server message
